text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, machines can create art, compose music, and even write stories. For example, AI tools can produce realistic paintings or generate original songs in seconds. Some people argue that this is not true creativity because machines simply follow patterns from existing data. However, others believe AI can inspire new forms of expression by combining ideas in unexpected ways. Human creativity involves emotion, experience, and intention, while machine creativity relies on algorithms and training data. Rather than replacing artists, AI often works as a collaborator, helping people explore fresh possibilities. The question of who or what is truly creative remains open.
